brand.name: Tenx IT Solutions
brand.tagline: Smarter Business — enterprise resource planning, refined.

hero.title: Smarter Business — every part of it, on one platform.
hero.subtitle: We're a leading cloud-based ERP based in Canada, with 20+ years transforming diverse industries across the Gulf, especially UAE — with ready-made tools to streamline operations and boost productivity.

valueProps.title: Built around the way modern businesses actually run.

modular.title: Truly modular
modular.body: Buy only what you need. Activate more as you grow. Every module talks to every other one — no integration tax.

realtime.title: Real-time everywhere
realtime.body: Stock levels, payroll runs, purchase orders, customer history — every dashboard reflects the latest state of your business.

compliant.title: Compliance, handled
compliant.body: Localised tax, payroll, and reporting rules ship in the box. Audit trails on every transaction. Your finance team will breathe easier.

extend.title: Extend without breaking
extend.body: REST + webhook surface for everything. Bring your own BI, build your own forms. Nothing is locked behind an upgrade tier.

solutions.title: 26 modules. One system.
solutions.subtitle: From finance to manufacturing to industry-specific verticals — TenxERP covers the entire enterprise surface.

stats.title: Trusted by businesses that take operations seriously.

testimonials.title: What our customers say about us

cta.title: Ready to see your operations on one screen?
cta.subtitle: Book a 30-minute walkthrough — we'll spin up a sandbox seeded with your industry's data.

about.title: AI-driven business solutions — built for the Gulf, serving the world.
about.lead: We're a leading cloud-based ERP based in Canada, with 20+ years transforming diverse industries across the Gulf, especially UAE — with ready-made tools to streamline operations and boost productivity.
about.missionBody: To deliver AI-driven, cloud-based business solutions that empower companies of every size to streamline operations, boost productivity and grow with confidence.
about.visionBody: To be the most trusted ERP partner in the Gulf and beyond — known for ready-made depth, regional expertise and software that respects the people who use it every day.
about.story: Tenx IT Solutions has been transforming the way businesses run for over two decades. Headquartered in Canada with deep roots in the Gulf, our platform — TenxERP — brings together finance, HR, inventory, manufacturing, sales, CRM and more into a single integrated system. From property management companies to municipalities, charities to retailers, our customers rely on us to handle their operations from A to Z.
about.teamSubtitle: Engineers, designers and operators who care about how work actually feels.

contact.title: Tell us what you're trying to fix.
contact.lead: Whether you're evaluating, migrating, or scaling — we'd love to hear from you. Average response time is under four hours during business days.
